description_long: This is a large, cylindrical red metal barrel with a slightly weathered and worn surface, featuring two prominent horizontal reinforcement bands near the top and bottom. The top of the barrel is sealed with a fitted lid, which has two black circular bungs or caps, likely for filling or emptying contents. One side of the barrel displays a clear hazardous material symbol, specifically the radiation warning sign, indicating it is used for storing or transporting dangerous substances. There is a noticeable black spill or stain on the lid and upper side, suggesting previous leakage or contamination. The surface finish is matte with visible scuffs and scratches, giving it an industrial, utilitarian appearance. This type of barrel is commonly found in industrial or hazardous waste storage areas, especially outdoors or in restricted urban zones.
description: A large, red metal barrel with a radiation warning symbol, black bungs on the lid, and visible signs of wear and contamination.
description_view_0: Front view showing the radiation warning symbol and two black bungs on the lid.
description_view_1: Side view with a prominent black spill or stain on the lid and upper rim, partially obscuring the top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the plain red surface, two black bungs on the lid, and no visible markings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the black spill visible on the lid, no symbols or markings on the barrel body.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: integrated steel reinforcement rings near top and bottom
